---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new metric, surface, or capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the gap, not the solution. "We can't currently see X for
Y editors" is more useful than "add a chart." -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- Optional but appreciated: a sketch of how this might be
implemented. Reference existing modules where possible (compute/labor,
patrol, etc.). -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Briefly: are there workarounds today? Why aren't they enough? -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What this proposal explicitly does NOT cover. Helps reviewers
size the work. -->
